creator: m.muenz@gmail.com
text:
I updated the patch to 8.10 since it's now a CVE included. 
Removed the LIB_DEPENDS as it seems just to be cosmetic for building in /usr/ports, added a shebang for new python script and sorted pkg-plist

- portlint -A is happy
- poudriere test and build is fine on 12.1 64bit
- installed the pkg on my system and was able to run a VPN
